reviews.review_title: This game is so much fun
reviews.review_description: In this game you get to play all sorts of mini games play horror game things and you may even meet a developer or moderator it’s really fun go check it out now

It’s a very good game. They have very kind owners and moderators and they’re online often. A bunch of things in this game that I have never seen in any other game that played. Overall, it’s like the best game ever ￼￼
￼

I like giving fair reviews and this was good but i found myself not having anything to do after a while. I think this game is newer so i'm being less harsh also olaf kicked me and my friend randomly so yeah

developer_response.body: Thank you for your honesty we are working hard to make the maps better and we will have new game modes soon. Also sorry for getting kicked.

reviews.review_description: This game is soon fun i got to met the owner and he showed me unreleased maps it was soo funny u should try this game
This game still getting updated,and has diffent maps to play on and you can even join public lobbys my user name in this game is w.
The mods told me to kill myself because i was better then them and I was being kind to everyone one and they wished opon my demise

developer_response.body: Sorry, Who said that to you?
